## Change checklist

- [ ] Module imports and target dependencies are updated where needed.
- [ ] `project.yml` and the generated Xcode project are both updated.
- [ ] Source registry entries and source-text pins are current.
- [ ] Invariant IDs, rationale comments, and `pinned:` anchors are current.
- [ ] User-facing strings and localization catalogs are updated.
- [ ] New behavior has executable tests, with RED/GREEN evidence where applicable.
- [ ] The app and extensions compile for the affected configurations.
- [ ] Device evidence is included for device-only behavior, or marked not applicable.

## Verification

List the exact commands and device checks run. Explain any unchecked or not-applicable item.
